sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tuples (id UInt32, values Tuple(UInt32, UInt32, UInt32));
SELECT id, values, tupleModuloByNumber(values, 2) AS remainders FROM test_tuples;
UPDATE test_tuples SET values = (20, 30, 40) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tupleModuloByNumber((25, 35, 45), 10) AS moduli FROM test_tuples;
